groupings.title: Setup and Route
groupings.description: Install, map, inspect, and route the GitLab workflow.

groupings.title: Plan
groupings.description: Create the right-sized plan for the selected flow.

groupings.title: Deliver
groupings.description: Implement features or fixes and review the resulting MR.

groupings.title: Release and Learn
groupings.description: Prepare release evidence and close the context loop.
